rationale: Educ. Code §37.014 mandates school districts appoint liaison officers for court-related children. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraisals, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Each school district shall appoint at least one educator to act as liaison officer for court-related children who are enrolled in the district.
_note: No textual or conceptual overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute's liaison-officer requirement.
